feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Buck's silent struggle
entry.summary:
Author: broncho1000

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,245Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 148

Summary: After a dangerous rescue, tensions at the 118 remain high following Buck’s lawsuit, leaving him more isolated than ever.While the team struggles with unresolved anger and distance, something begins to feel off—but no one notices the warning signs in time.When an unexpected discovery turns everything upside down, guilt, fear, and old emotions rise to the surface.As the team is forced to confront the consequences of pushing Buck away, Eddie finds himself facing the terrifying possibility that some mistakes can’t be undone.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: 100 miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: Lyla_Nostra

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,403Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 158

Summary: Buck saved fifteen people before the pacific claimed him. Four days later, he was declared dead. A week later, they buried an empty casket. But Evan Buckley has always been a fighter, and he isn’t done yet. While Eddie struggles to raise Christopher without their anchor, Buck begins a grueling journey back from the dead. Because there is nothing in this world that could stop Buck from coming back to his family.

entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,628Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 632

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)

entry.title: Whatever Words You Need
entry.summary:
Author: AstraeaXAccalia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,054Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 126

Summary: There’s weight across him, an arm draped loosely but firmly over his torso, the faint, steady rhythm of someone else’s breathing brushing against his skin. Skin against skin. No barrier, no layers, nothing between them except heat and contact.  Why is Eddie... Oh my god. Or Buck wakes up hungover in a hotel room after Chim’s bachelor party, realizes he and Eddie had a very real hookup… and immediately spirals into panic because now he’s convinced Eddie was just drunk and he’s single-handedly ruined their entire relationship.

entry.summary:
Author: Buckedie

entry.title: Your Heart’s a Bird Without the Wings to Fly
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,743Chapters: 15/20Kudos: 137

Summary: "Buck!" Eddies voice rang through the space, abruptly cut off by the deafening sound of crumpling concrete hitting the ground. Eddie stared at the rubble now blocking the way between himself and Buck. "Buck," Eddie whimpered as he dropped to his knees in front of the pile of rubble Buck was buried under. OR If episode 9x3 actually included the subway collapse from the promo, because I'm so mad about that.Continuing the story using that as a plot point. It will be canon divergent from that point onward in season 9, episode 3.

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,327Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: Jessie's Girl
entry.summary:
Author: James_Madison_617

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,394Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: There were a few things Eddie’d been trying to incorporate into his life more upon his therapist's recommendation. One of these things was to listen to music a little more. He’d gotten into some classic rock, finding that to be the most soothing to listen to in his moments alone.  He hadn’t even noticed he’d been singing filling the kitchen with the lyrics of Jessie’s Girl, but Buck seemed to notice, bopping his head along to the tune with a small smile and watching him out of the corner of his eye as he tossed the salad a few feet away.  “'Cause she's watching him with those eyesAnd she's loving him with that body, I just know itAnd he's holding her in his arms late, late at nightYou know, I wish that I wasJessie's girlI wish that I was Jessie's girl-” “Those aren’t the right lyrics, dad” Chris interrupted as he walked into the room. “It’s ‘I wish I had Jessie’s girl’, not ‘I wish I was Jessie’s girl’. But you know,” he looked between his father and Buck with a small smirk “I can see why you of all people would get that wrong.” Or,Buck and Eddie getting clocked by everybody

entry.title: is there someone else?
entry.summary:
Author: polybenzylene

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,855Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 457

Summary: Eddie's talking about Marisol, about how he should have seen it coming, about how he's tired of trying to make things work that aren't meant to work. Buck is listening, mostly, but he's also watching the way Eddie's throat moves when he swallows, the way his fingers drum restlessly against the table. "What about you?" Eddie asks suddenly. "How's Tommy?" Buck blinks. - or; Kim situation never happened, Eddie and Marisol break up. Buck and Eddie get a bit too drunk.

entry.title: the way home
entry.summary:
Author: sunflowerbuckleys (flashhwing)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,779Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: "We're a long way from home," says Helena, "searching for a man we barely know, who our son intends to marry. A man who's loved by so many strangers, but not his own parents." "I don't think they're strangers to him." "They're strangers to us." "Yes," Ramon says. "I suppose they are."Buck goes missing. Helena and Ramon help search for him.

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,071Chapters: 8/11Kudos: 105

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

entry.title: Let's Get Married
entry.summary:
Author: BuddieCanonTonight

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,543Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 24

Summary: And that should be it - if there’s no girlfriend, then there’s no need to even think about getting married again. Or there shouldn’t be a need. Somehow there still is. Somehow Eddie finds himself standing in his kitchen, hands gripping the countertop behind his back looking across the room into eyes he could pick from a line up not even trying to stop the words coming from his mouth. “Let’s get married” OR Eddie marries Buck to help him adopt Theo, the aftermath of which leaves him confused and facing revelations he's not yet ready to understand.

entry.title: eddie diaz's 15 step guide to scoring a husband
entry.summary:
Author: peachicedtea73

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,501Chapters: 14/15Kudos: 135

Summary: He laid back down, staring up at the ceiling again. When he couldn’t fall asleep, he usually tried some 4-7-8 counting method that he learned ages ago. It often did the trick in a matter of minutes, 15 at most.This was not one of those nights.No matter what he did, how much he tossed and turned, he couldn’t stop his brain from thinking and overanalyzing.What did they mean by that? ‘Just made sense,’ we don’t do everything together, we’re not—Eddie shot up mid-thought.“Oh. Oh god,” he said to no one. ... some old family book inspires eddie to make a guide for getting his man.
